name: Schala Zeal
description:
Schala is the gentle, demure, and beautiful princess of Zeal, and is the last to ever carry that title. Born into royalty, she was immediately identified as having a penchant for magic. Some speculated her ability surpassed Queen Zeal's. When the Mammon Machine was constructed, she was given a special Pendant to control it and the other Sealed Doors. Her younger brother Janus was said to have gotten along well with her. She deeply cared for her younger sibling and looked out for him. Perhaps only she and Melchior knew of Janus' true power as well, for Janus expressed feeling the Black Wind to her at times.

Adorned in purple robes, Schala sports voluminous blue hair that she keeps tied in a ponytail with a red ribbon. She wears huge circular earrings and a Dreamstone Pendant, and has very pale skin. She often appears downcast or melancholy.
creator: ArgosyDreamer
